layout.strategy: Minimalist, top-heavy, full-width dividers. No rounded cards. Left-align content for stark editorial feel.
layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 and p-8 for breathing room.

onboarding.description: Stark, confrontational but helpful. Massive text.
components: Quote text: 'Sen her şeyi yapmaya çalışıyorsun. Bu yüzden hiçbirini bitiremiyorsun.' (Playfair Display, text-4xl or larger, left-aligned or centered for impact)
CTA Button: Full width at bottom, Accent color bg, Black text, 'Başla', data-testid='start-button'

home.description: The core focus view. Newspaper date header, 3 distinct slots.
components: Date Header: 'Çarşamba, 1 Nisan', Serif, very large, crisp bottom border, data-testid='date-header'
Task Slots (x3): Minimalist text inputs. No boxes, just 1px bottom borders separating them. data-testid='task-slot-1'
Empty State: Placeholder text in Mono font, text_secondary color.
Filled State: Standard Mono font, text_primary color.

interactions.completion: On tap, strike-through animates left-to-right. Text fades to text_secondary. Accent colored checkmark appears.
interactions.celebration: 3/3 triggers a brief amber/orange screen flash or minimalist confetti burst.

components: Streak Counter: Massive number at top (Serif), 'Günlük Seri' label (Mono). data-testid='streak-counter'
Calendar Grid: Minimalist boxes. Green (3/3), Yellow (partial), Red (0). data-testid='calendar-grid'
Time Picker: Morning notification config. data-testid='time-picker'
Icon Selector: 3 minimalist options (Dots, Lines, Squares). data-testid='icon-selector'

components.button: Square edges, high contrast. hover:bg-opacity-80 transition-opacity. Font: Mono, Uppercase.
components.input: Transparent background, massive text, border-none focus:outline-none. Rely on parent container for bottom border.
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (regular or light weight). Strict minimalism.

motion.general: Minimal. No bouncy effects. Sharp, purposeful transitions.

testing.requirement: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='task-input-1').
